patterns.message: Warning: Freezing level rising (1834 → 1968 → 2699m). Rain risk at freeride elevations.
Close to cold snap Day 8: 5°C drop to -5°C (needs >5°C drop below -5°C).
Cold snap Day 16: 5°C drop to -12°C. Great for powder preservation.
